layout.updateDesc: A new version of CyberVPN is ready to install.
layout.trafficBlockDesc: CyberVPN Assistant detected a failure ({{reason}}) connecting to {{domain}}.

dashboard.title: Terminal
dashboard.stealthActive: Stealth Camouflage Enabled: Traffic Reshaping Active
dashboard.noProfilesError: No profiles available. Please add one in Profiles first.
dashboard.tunErrorAdmin: TUN Mode requires Administrator / Root privileges. Please restart the app with elevation.
dashboard.catalogLoadError: Failed to load the profile catalog: {{error}}
dashboard.selectionPersistError: Failed to store the selected proxy: {{error}}
dashboard.tunModeDesc: Routes ALL system traffic through the VPN. Requires Administrator / Root privileges.
dashboard.stealthModeDesc: Reshapes packet timing and volume to evade Deep Packet Inspection (DPI) heuristics.
dashboard.debugReportDesc: Copy this whole block and send it here. It includes the latest diagnostics events and runtime log tails.
dashboard.debugReportCopied: Connection debug report copied to clipboard.
dashboard.accessProfileDesc: Choose the fleet, subscription, or group that will supply the exit nodes for this session.
dashboard.proxyNodeDesc: Pick the exact proxy inside the selected profile. Search stays responsive even for large fleets.
dashboard.searchProxyPlaceholder: Search by name, host, protocol, or SNI
dashboard.collectionHint_subscription: Subscription has not been synced yet
dashboard.selectedRouteDesc: This node is staged for the next connection attempt and stays visible while you evaluate the profile.
dashboard.collectionEmptyTitle: No nodes available in this profile
dashboard.collectionEmptyDesc: Switch the profile or import more proxies to keep this control surface populated.
dashboard.collectionNoMatchesHint: Try a city, protocol, hostname fragment, or SNI.
dashboard.catalogEmptyDesc: Import a subscription or add standalone nodes first, then return here to stage the route visually.
dashboard.pinnedRoutesDesc: Keep your trusted exits one tap away. Pins stay above the fleet and let you stage the route instantly.
dashboard.pinnedRoutesEmptyDesc: Star a route in the node list to keep it anchored here for faster session switching.
dashboard.latencyOpsDesc: Continuously probe exit nodes, autosort by live latency, and jump straight to the best or last stable route.
dashboard.smartRouteReasonTrusted: Balanced fast lane: pinned and proven stable.
dashboard.smartRouteReasonStable: Trusted stable route with healthy live latency.
dashboard.smartRouteReasonPreferred: Preferred lane with strong live latency.
dashboard.smartRouteReasonLive: Current live route stays favored while it keeps healthy telemetry.
dashboard.smartRouteReasonRelay: Relay chain stays available, but its extra hop slightly lowers its smart score.
dashboard.smartRouteReasonMeasured: Pure live latency leader in the current pool.
dashboard.smartRouteReasonFallback: Waiting for richer telemetry before promoting a route.
dashboard.latencyHeatmapDesc: Operator view of the fastest lanes inside the current pool. Tap any tile to stage it instantly.
dashboard.latencyHeatmapEmpty: No heatmap tiles yet. Run a live probe to light up this grid.
dashboard.regionClustersDesc: Inferred geo and route zones built from live node labels and hostnames.
dashboard.quickRouteQueued: {{route}} is staged for the next session.
dashboard.smartExplainEmpty: Pick a route to unlock smart-route reasoning.
dashboard.routeSignatureDesc: Transport, envelope, endpoint, and collection placement for the staged route.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configure core app preferences, experimental transport handshakes, and routing.
settings.proxyEngineDesc: Sing-box is recommended for modern protocols, while Xray-core stays available as the stable fallback core for Helix recovery.

logs.title: Logs
logs.description: Live desktop diagnostics, runtime tails, and one-click copy/export for connection debugging.

routing.title: BGP Split Tunneling
routing.description: Establish a BGP session to dynamically receive IP ranges and route them explicitly through the VPN tunnel.
routing.adminRequired: Changing system routes (BGP Proxy) requires administrator privileges.

security.title: Safety Center
security.description: Advanced network security tools to prevent data leaks and maintain connectivity.
security.killSwitchBlocked: Kill Switch has automatically blocked all internet traffic.
security.runAsAdmin: Please run CyberVPN as Administrator to alter firewall rules.
security.strictBlock: All non-VPN traffic is strictly blocked at the OS layer.
security.unsafe: Unsafe. Network leaks are possible if VPN drops.
security.repairDesc: Internet broken? App crashed? Use the Repair tool to flush DNS, clear ghost proxies, and forcefully reset Windows firewall block rules.
security.quantumDesc: Audit your cryptographic profiles for Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) readiness. Protects against "Harvest Now, Decrypt Later" (HNDL) attacks.
security.initScan: Initiate a scan to analyze your secure connections.
security.noProfiles: No profiles found in the system.
security.quantumShieldDesc: Hybrid ML-KEM-768 is active. This session is mathematically secured against quantum computer decryption.
security.partiallyReadyDesc: Protocol handles PQC at transport layer (QUIC) or partially supports it.
security.vulnerableDesc: Vulnerable to "Harvest Now, Decrypt Later" (HNDL) attacks by quantum computers.

privacyShield.title: Anti-DPI Shield
privacyShield.description: Neural firewall actively terminating invasive trackers, ads, and telemetry at the protocol sub-layer.
privacyShield.disabledDesc: Traffic flows freely without protocol-level inspection.
privacyShield.standardDesc: Blocks known malware and intrusive advertising networks.
privacyShield.strictDesc: Aggressively drops telemetry, social trackers, and analytical domains.

hotspot.title: LAN Share Pro
hotspot.description: Turn your PC into a secure VPN gateway for your Smart TVs, Consoles, and Mobile devices on the local network.
hotspot.adminDesc: To enable IP Forwarding, please run CyberVPN as Administrator.
hotspot.proxyDesc: Enter these identical Proxy settings into the Wi-Fi configuration of your other devices, or scan the QR code using a supported client.
hotspot.autoConfigureDesc: Scan this code with CyberVPN mobile apps to automatically lock onto this Desktop node.

account.saveSuccess: Sync Password saved securely in native Keyring
account.title: My Ecosystem
account.description: End-to-end encrypted synchronization. Securely manage your VPN configurations across devices.
account.passwordDesc: Your data is AES-GCM encrypted locally before transit. The server never sees your passwords.
account.handoverDesc: Scan this QR code with the CyberVPN mobile or TV app to instantly synchronize.

analytics.title: Command Center
analytics.subtitle: Global Telemetry & Traffic Historian
analytics.savedData: You've saved roughly {{saved}} of ad-data this month.
analytics.noData: No usage data found for this period.

profiles.title: Profiles
profiles.description: Manage your VPN and Proxy node configurations.
profiles.subscriptionUrlHint: This looks like a subscription URL. Add it on the {{destination}} page instead of Profiles.
profiles.addDialogDesc: Enter the connection details for your new secure tunnel.
profiles.name: Name
profiles.noProfiles: No profiles found. Create one securely.

automation.title: Smart Connect
automation.description: Neural environment awareness. Automatically shift VPN protocols and shields based on network hostility.

onboarding.step1Desc: Next-generation privacy infrastructure engineered for extreme stealth, routing efficiency, and absolute zero-knowledge connectivity.
onboarding.step2Desc2: to capture all OS layer packets before they hit your ISP. This guarantees 100% leak protection but requires administrative prompts upon your first connection.
onboarding.step3Desc: Your environment is configured. You can now import a subscription node, or scan a remote QR code to sync directly with your devices.
onboarding.step3Footer: Import nodes inside the Main Dashboard

remote.title: Remote Controller
remote.subtitle: Manage the VPN connection via Mobile Dashboard
remote.instruction1: Click ENABLE REMOTE to deploy the hardened Axum HTTP server on your local network zero-trust boundary.
remote.instruction2: Take your primary smart device (Mobile/Tablet) ensuring it is connected to the same Local Area Network (WiFi).
remote.instruction3: Scan the QR Code with the device camera to instantly authenticate a bearer token mapped natively without cloud brokering.

splitTunneling.title: Split Tunneling
splitTunneling.description: Intelligently route specific applications through or around the VPN.
splitTunneling.allowDesc: ONLY selected apps will be secured by the VPN. All other traffic skips the tunnel.
splitTunneling.disallowDesc: Selected apps will BYPASS the VPN. All other traffic is secured by default.

stealthLab.noNode: No active proxy node found to run diagnostics on.
stealthLab.title: Stealth Lab
stealthLab.subtitle: Surgical deep-packet inspection diagnostics. Overcome extreme ISP censorship environments.
stealthLab.actionDesc: Initiate a comprehensive sweep of your ISP's DPI fingerprinting methods. We will identify precisely which filters are blocking connection.

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.addDesc: Provide a URL to automatically fetch and sync nodes.
subscriptions.name: Name

routingEngine.title: Routing Engine
routingEngine.description: Configure custom detours and DNS overrides. Rules are evaluated top to bottom.
routingEngine.atLeastOne: Please provide at least one Domain or IP
routingEngine.noRules: No custom routing rules defined. All traffic flows through default paths.
